notes.model_switch: Qwen2.5-32B → Qwen3-8B (2025-04, user requested newer model)

key_findings.8b_pilot: Different model → different winner: FullRegen dominates ARC/MATH, CoT wins StrategyQA
key_findings.cross_model_insight: Repair advantage is model-size dependent: larger models benefit from targeted repair, smaller models benefit from full rewrite
